query:
SELECT cph.*, c.name as customer_name, p.name as product_name
FROM customer_price_history cph
LEFT JOIN companies c ON cph.customerId = c.id
LEFT JOIN products p ON cph.productId = p.id
WHERE c.name = 'ABC Furniture'
ORDER BY cph.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
